name: Refactor Module
description: Systematically refactor a module or component: understand current design, identify smells, plan changes, implement safely, and verify no regressions

steps.name: Understand Current Design
steps.description: Read all files in the target module. Map the data flow, dependencies, public API surface, and any side effects. Note what callers depend on.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Current design understood, dependency map created, public API surface documented

steps.name: Identify Code Smells
steps.description: Find specific refactoring targets: long functions, deep nesting, duplicated logic, poor naming, god objects, primitive obsession, and feature envy. Prioritize by impact.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Prioritized list of code smells with specific file/line references and refactoring techniques to apply

steps.name: Plan Refactoring
steps.description: Design the target state. Define new module boundaries, function signatures, and data structures. Ensure backward compatibility or plan the migration path for callers.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Refactoring plan documented with before/after structure, list of files to change, and migration notes

steps.name: Write Tests First
steps.description: Before changing any code, write or verify tests that capture current behavior. These are your regression safety net. Run them to confirm they pass on current code.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Tests written covering current behavior, all tests passing before refactoring begins

steps.name: Implement Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the refactoring in small, safe steps. Commit after each step. Do not mix refactoring with feature changes. Run tests after every individual change.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All planned refactoring applied, code is cleaner, all tests still pass

steps.name: Verify and Review
steps.description: Run the full test suite, linter, and type checker. Compare the before and after. Confirm no behavior changes leaked in. Update documentation if public API changed.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All tests pass, linter clean, no unintended behavior changes, docs updated if needed
